ddls:
CREATE TABLE "corporations" (
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corporation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the corporation */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the corporation is headquartered */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the corporation belongs to */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the corporation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the corporation's business */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the corporation was established */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of operation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corporations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of financial metrics */,
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corporation these metrics belong to */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales of the corporation */,
  "profits" REAL /* Profits of the corporation */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets owned by the corporation */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the corporation */,
  "debt" REAL /* Total debt of the corporation */,
  "equity" REAL /* Total equity of the corporation */,
  "roe" REAL /* Return on equity (ROE) */,
  "roa" REAL /* Return on assets (ROA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_corp_id FOREIGN KEY ("corp_id") REFERENCES corporations ("corp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales data entry */,
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corporation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales data */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the sales data */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Amount of sales */,
  "revenue_growth" REAL /* Revenue growth rate */,
  "gross_margin" REAL /* Gross margin percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_corp_id FOREIGN KEY ("corp_id") REFERENCES corporations ("corp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profit_data" (
  "profit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profit data entry */,
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corporation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the profit data */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the profit data */,
  "profit_amount" REAL /* Amount of profit */,
  "net_margin" REAL /* Net margin percentage */,
  "operating_profit" REAL /* Operating profit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profit_data_corp_id FOREIGN KEY ("corp_id") REFERENCES corporations ("corp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_data" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset data entry */,
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corporation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the asset data */,
  "asset_description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "asset_value" REAL /* Value of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., current, non-current) */,
  "depreciation" REAL /* Depreciation amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_data_corp_id FOREIGN KEY ("corp_id") REFERENCES corporations ("corp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_value_data" (
  "market_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market value data entry */,
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corporation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the market value data */,
  "market_value_amount" REAL /* Amount of market value */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_value_data_corp_id FOREIGN KEY ("corp_id") REFERENCES corporations ("corp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corporation */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking position of the corporation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "score" REAL /* Composite score used for ranking */,
  "ranking_category" TEXT /* Category of the ranking (e.g., sales, profits, market value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_corp_id FOREIGN KEY ("corp_id") REFERENCES corporations ("corp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert the user wishes to receive */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alerts */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the alerts (e.g., email, SMS, app notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who manages the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment strategy */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy used by the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset in a portfolio */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corporation */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested in the corporation */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "shares_owned" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_corp_id FOREIGN KEY ("corp_id") REFERENCES corporations ("corp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_assets_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES investment_portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was sent */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., market update, financial news) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corporation_news" (
  "corp_news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corporation news entry */,
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corporation */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the news article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the news article to the corporation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corp_news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corporation_news_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corporation_news_corp_id FOREIGN KEY ("corp_id") REFERENCES corporations ("corp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_news_preferences" (
  "user_news_pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user news preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "article_type" TEXT /* Type of news article the user wishes to receive */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the news articles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_news_pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_news_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
